response.original_title: Hawkwind: Warrior on the Edge of Time
response.overview: Headphone Dust is pleased to present a new edition of Hawkwind's landmark 1975 album Warrior on the Edge of Time, featuring new 2026 Steven Wilson mixes created from the original multi-track master tapes. This release includes new 2026 stereo, 5.1 surround and Dolby Atmos mixes, alongside an exclusive binaural Headphone Dust mix optimised for headphone listening. Please note that Spiral Galaxy 28948 (track 7) and Kings of Speed (track 10) exist without complete multitrack recordings; the 5.1 and Atmos presentations of these tracks are upmixes rather than discrete mixes from original source material. Also included are a selection of 2026 remasters of some of the bonus tracks originally presented on the Atomhenge expanded edition.  Recorded in 1975 and featuring a lineup of Dave Brock, Nik Turner, Lemmy, Simon House, Simon King and Alan Powell, Warrior on the Edge of Time remains one of the most significant rock albums of the mid-1970s and a cornerstone of Hawkwind's catalogue.
response.title: Hawkwind: Warrior on the Edge of Time
